channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] あたしが以前から推してるバンドの新曲
item.dc:creator: 三寒四温＠趣味の執筆者 (cinq-en-sion.bsky.social)
item.description:
あたしが以前から推してるバンドの新曲
マジでベースがカッコええわあ！
イロモノと捉えられそうだがガチの実力派なのだ
BAND-MAID / ENERGETIC

youtu.be/NpZjslVGhbE?...

BlueSky · cinq-en-sion.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] what it's like to see BAND-MAID live

item.description:
what it's like to see BAND-MAID live

#music #japan

youtu.be/EeMsM5erg7Q?...

昨日リリースの新シングル ♫ ENERGETIC - Single - BAND-MAID

item.title: [BlueSky] Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! I hope this year sees many more good t...
item.dc:creator: El is in the Details (elsbells.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! I hope this year sees many more good things come to you. 😊

And I was not previously familiar with Band-Maid, but they go so hard! That was a really fun video, and I appreciate you introducing me to them.

BlueSky · elsbells.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Happy womb emancipation day, Doc!
item.dc:creator: The Antarian Ambassador (antarian-embassy.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy womb emancipation day, Doc!

I had heard of Band-Maid, but never listened to anything by them; didn't know they were metal. I'll have to check them out some more.

BlueSky · antarian-embassy.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Happy Birthday to me! New Band-Maid!
item.dc:creator: Joshua Earle, Ph.D. (cyborgapologist.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy Birthday to me! New Band-Maid!

www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpZj...

BlueSky · cyborgapologist.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Re-listening to this album and goddamn, does anyone know where I can get a re...
item.dc:creator: Derek Smith (darathus.xyz)
item.description:
Re-listening to this album and goddamn, does anyone know where I can get a replacement face? This one was melted from the opening riff.

BAND-MAID - Ready to Rock
www.youtube.com/watch?v=eapN...

BlueSky · darathus.xyz

item.title: [BlueSky] why pick one when i can have all three?

item.description:
why pick one when i can have all three?
•
#BANDMAID

item.title: [BlueSky] It's been a good while since I talked about them, especially here, but it's a...
item.dc:creator: Shelbie 🐺⚔️ (theshiz147.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's been a good while since I talked about them, especially here, but it's always good when we get new BAND-MAID music. And I always love how so many of their songs have such powerful and positive lyrics. Definitely need that kind of music right now.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpZj...

BlueSky · theshiz147.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] New Music Alert! 🇯🇵 BAND-MAID New Single “ENERGETIC”
item.dc:creator: Tokyo Noizu - Japanese Rock & Metal Music (tokyonoizu.bsky.social)
item.description:
New Music Alert! 🇯🇵 BAND-MAID New Single “ENERGETIC”

The internationally acclaimed rock outfit have announced the release of their new single, ENERGETIC, arriving on 24 June alongside an official music video.

Read more: tokyonoizu.com

#japan #metalheads #bandmaid

BlueSky · tokyonoizu.bsky.social

🌸🎉 BAND-MAIDの新曲は必聴です！ 🌟
#BANDMAID #ENERGETIC

item.title: [BlueSky] Brand new Band Maid
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
Brand new Band Maid
LOVE the performance part of this vid, they just look so joyous. Wait for this to get an extended live bass intro. Great showcase for Misa, love Kanamii's solo too. I still find the recent compositions a bit messy, but this is the best for a while.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 2016年に戻って 生うどんとバンドじゃないもん!とゆるめるモと神聖かまってちゃんのライブETUDE HOUSEコスメで酔っぱらい地雷メイクして行きたい
item.dc:creator: とびお (cigaya.bsky.social)
item.description:
2016年に戻って 生うどんとバンドじゃないもん!とゆるめるモと神聖かまってちゃんのライブETUDE HOUSEコスメで酔っぱらい地雷メイクして行きたい

マセガキ小学生としていっぱいリスカして家出して、元祖トー横に住み着きたい。
松パーカーも欲しい、デレステもやりたい

BAND MAIDと酸欠少女さユりBABYMETALも学校のリア垢で推したい
Twitterでオタアカつくるんだ、あの頃は流行を斜に構えてたから今度は何でも楽しみたい

BlueSky · cigaya.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] in a closet-ppo (laughs).
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
in a closet-ppo (laughs).

Akane: In our approach to songs, a BAND-MAID characteristic is to furiously pack cool elements in.

Miku: This song was a lead song candidate alongside "Don’t you tell ME". An expansion follows the last chorus, and we are giving a sense of twin vocals like "Alone", our rep

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Band-Maid bring such a fierce joy to everything they play. Take Me Higher is ...
item.dc:creator: onyx · warmth, laughs, the occasional deep thought (advantage87.bsky.social)
item.description:
Band-Maid bring such a fierce joy to everything they play. Take Me Higher is a perfect title for that energy of theirs.

BlueSky · advantage87.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — It is also nice to have a song like "Take me higher!!" that more closely fo...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— It is also nice to have a song like "Take me higher!!" that more closely follows the themes of BAND-MAID up to now. You also firmly put your determination as a band into the lyrics.

Kanami: There is a feeling of our usual straightforward seeming approach, isn’t there?

Miku: Yup. After all I thou

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

Arrangement: BAND-MAID TIENOWA
1st Live:1/8/2017

item.title: [BlueSky] Friday at Download Festival 2026: Scene Queen, Lake Malice, Halestorm and Ban...
item.dc:creator: LOUD WOMEN (loudwomen.org)
item.description:
Friday at Download Festival 2026: Scene Queen, Lake Malice, Halestorm and Band Maid

A special one for Artemi, Halestorm opened up with confetti, pyro and cryo (and thats just in the first two songs), Halestorm show themselves to be future main stage headliners with an electrifying set full of rock…

BlueSky · loudwomen.org

item.title: [BlueSky] those who don’t know well about Band-Maid.
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
those who don’t know well about Band-Maid.

Saiki: That’s right. We got fired up even more when the video was completed, and we were really like “Yes, yes, this is what we wanted!” (laughs)

Miku Kobato: You know, there are scenes in the beginning where we appear one by one, po. Each of them is link

二十岁穿女仆装服平平无奇，三十+的女仆装就有反叛感有点拽了呢
祝各位头发花白还穿着最可爱的女仆装出来合照

item.title: [BlueSky] ngs have different kinds of heaviness, so I think you can listen to them with...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
ngs have different kinds of heaviness, so I think you can listen to them without getting bored. The MV of Order, which hasn’t been released yet, uses a live footage, so you can feel the heat of our performance if you haven’t seen us live.

Kobato: I want you all to see it because we Band-Maid don’t

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Saiki: In addition, Order (Track 3) is the successor to Thrill (included in t...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Saiki: In addition, Order (Track 3) is the successor to Thrill (included in their 2nd mini-album New Beginning released in 2015), which made us Band-Maid to pursue heaviness. Its vocal assignments are similar, and our instrumentalists show off a higher level of a guitar solo, slap bass, and the doub

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Pretty much anything by Band Maid, but uh... Their songs start super hardcore...
item.dc:creator: David Kuszmar (davidkuszmar.com)
item.description:
Pretty much anything by Band Maid, but uh... Their songs start super hardcore so it goes from Inhuman to Godlike pretty quick.

BlueSky · davidkuszmar.com

item.title: [Mastodon] I discovered The Warning through their friendship with Band-Maid, and I think...
item.dc:creator: Chris Jags (ChrisJagged)
item.description:
I discovered The Warning through their friendship with Band-Maid, and I think they're a very solid band. Cool video, too.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=juwlhYHWHTM

https://mastodon.social/tags/TheWarning https://mastodon.social/tags/Metal https://mastodon.social/tags/music https://mastodon.social/tags/BandMaid

Mastodon · ChrisJagged

item.title: [BlueSky] 多来点BAND-MAID 和 The Warning这种合作好吗……人活着就是要看这种乐队活儿
item.dc:creator: WineHusk/酒壳 (sld07.bsky.social)
item.description:
多来点BAND-MAID 和 The Warning这种合作好吗……人活着就是要看这种乐队活儿
打死我也想不到在别的圈接触的墨西哥姐妹乐队和动画OP认识的乐队居然会合作，梦幻

item.title: [BlueSky] I put more clips of the Band-Maid show in London up on YouTube.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
I put more clips of the Band-Maid show in London up on YouTube.

It's going to be a while before I see them live again, especially as they are taking next year off 😭

youtu.be/WWV_Tv36lNw

item.title: [BlueSky] e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-Maid®, but we decided our musical direction through Thrill and united together, which was really important. Each of us changed our approach in sound making.

Misa (bass): Since all of us are technique-oriented, we like our

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?

KANAMI: Maybe “Thrill” is the easiest to play?

Saiki: Isn’t “FREEDOM”?

Miku: No.

MISA: Eh?

AKANE: The degree of difficulty depends on which part you play (laughs)
--------------------

— The first trigger that made you greatly

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.dc:creator: MAGMOE (magmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
JOURNEY、NIGHT RANGER、LOUDNESS、BAND-MAID等出演の音楽イベント”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”、タイムテーブル公開！

https://www.magmoe.com/3041544/music/2026-06-18/

8月29日にみずほPayPayドーム福岡にて開催される”THE GREATEST ROCK FUKUOKA”（通称：フクロック）のタイムテーブルが公開された！　　JOURNEY、NIGHT RAN [...]

item.title: [BlueSky] One OK Rock is such a Band where i am still surprised that they're Songs were...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
One OK Rock is such a Band where i am still surprised that they're Songs were never featured on Anime Openings since they have the Style and Power for that and Band-Maid on the other Hand were already featured in some Anime OPs 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Funny Thing is Passcode and Band-Maid i know thx to the Youtube Algorithm yea...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Funny Thing is Passcode and Band-Maid i know thx to the Youtube Algorithm years ago and One OK Rock i know because they were used back in a Trailer for the Devil May Cry made by Ninja Theory and since then i am a Fan 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Well then is now your first Chance 😎 also loving that they also put Passcode...
item.dc:creator: Tao Of Chaos (taoofchaos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Well then is now your first Chance 😎 also loving that they also put Passcode, Band-Maid and One OK Rock on it so that more people can hear them 😁

BlueSky · taoofchaos.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Who wants to give me a couple million to put together a big concert that goes...
item.dc:creator: Kenny McMillan (kwmcmillan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Who wants to give me a couple million to put together a big concert that goes Drug Church > Band Maid > Queens of the Stone Age?

I swear I can make it happen.
